issues.title: Move GPOs out of category "Windows Components"
issues.suggested_reply: @yeelam-gordon — community PR #337 touches `policies/IntelligentTerminal.admx`, `policies/en-US/IntelligentTerminal.adml` (policy/GPO files; area owner not mapped, but your account is the only recent git-log owner). 7-day SLA clock starts today. Worth a first pass?

issues.title: Eternal Terminal (step 1): per-tab /save-tab + /restore-tab (layout + content)
issues.suggested_reply: Hi @DDKinger, CI is failing on `check-spelling` — quick scan points at the spelling job/report for this PR. Could you take a look at https://github.com/microsoft/intelligent-terminal/runs/85550128776? If it's flaky, push an empty commit (`git commit --allow-empty -m "ci: rerun"`) to re-run.

issues.title: Setting delegateAgent to a different agent than acpAgent crashes master process (wta-master pipe connect failure)
issues.suggested_reply:
Sorry you hit a crash @Aust-aa-36. For crashes specifically we need the backend diagnostic data, which you can capture via Feedback Hub: https://aka.ms/intelligent-terminal-feedback. Pick the matching category, hit "Share My Feedback" after submitting, and paste the link here.

I noticed the concrete transport error you included: <!-- from body -->`helper ACP transport failed: connect to master pipe '\\.\pipe\wta-master-<GUID>' after 21 attempt(s): The system cannot find the file specified. (os error 2)`<!-- /from body -->. That should help us distinguish a master crash from a startup/config failure once we have the diagnostic data.

PS: If you can still reproduce it, please also zip `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Packages\*IntelligentTerminal*\LocalCache\Local\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` (or `%LOCALAPPDATA%\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` for unpackaged dev builds) after setting `WTA_LOG=debug` and attach it here.

issues.title: Improve Copilot auth flow after install
Stucked on loading
issues.suggested_reply:
Hi @MartinSusky, could you grab a WTA log next time you hit this?

I can see from the screenshot that the Agent sessions picker is stuck at <!-- from image -->`Loading...`<!-- /from image --> after selecting Claude.

1. Reproduce the issue.
2. Zip
   `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Packages\*IntelligentTerminal*\LocalCache\Local\IntelligentTerminal\logs\`
   (or `%LOCALAPPDATA%\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` for unpackaged dev builds).
3. Attach the zip here.

If the issue is hard to reproduce, set `WTA_LOG=debug` first to get the noisier traces.
